questions.question: Paul says he can do all things through whom?
Paul tells the Philippians to think about things that are what?
options: True, noble, right, pure, lovely, admirable
questions.answer: True, noble, right, pure, lovely, admirable

questions.question: Paul says he has learned to be content in every situation.
I can do all things through Christ who _____ me.
The peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your _____ in Christ Jesus.
